reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: Absolutely love this speaker. It's a little heavy, but it sounds great. We use this floating down the river as it floats on water. BUT my ex flipper his kayak and took the speaker with him, resulting in the speaker flipping over. The speaker took on some water and didn't work right after. Make sure the speaker stays up right. It has a weighter bottom to help it stay upright, but things happen.
reviews.author: Missy

reviews.title: Great sound loud
reviews.text: Purchased this for a small gathering and it was perfect
reviews.author: AdrianM

reviews.title: Awesome sound
reviews.text: This is a good deal for beach days. It can be loud but the quality of sound is really good. And being water resistant is good as well.
reviews.author: Lerchcon

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: This is the second Rockbox XL that I had to purchase. Both of them broke pretty easily. Warranty is up on Best Buy and they won’t help me fix it.

reviews.text: Huge upgrade over my smaller BT speaker with sweet deep bass.  and for a good price so it can't be beat.  Seems to be able to take a beating but I haven't pushed my luck on that.

reviews.text: Great speaker for every place. Beach or anywhere you want

reviews.title: 5 hour battery life
reviews.text: full charge only lasted 5 hours at max volume.. took almost 3 hours to recharge. Not very loud for the size of the speaker, but sound quality is good. Not worth the price.

reviews.text: This unit has a nice battery life. It sounds decent and it is not super bulky to carry around.

reviews.title: Very awesome speaker
reviews.text: Purchased this speaker for my grandson and he is really happy with it. It has Bluetooth and a different variety of lights to choose from. Sound is very good and it is very loud. So I am pleased with price of it.

reviews.title: Small party speaker
reviews.text: Nice sound good shape and size just wish it had fm tuner built in.

Speaker sounds really good; the bass has a solid hold to it. 
Have not tested waterproof features yet but overall sound and build quality is on par with higher end speakers.

reviews.title: Highly recommended speaker.
reviews.text: Did research on all the outdoor speakers on the market and this one was the one for me.  Great bang for my buck as it gives me exactly what I need without having to break the bank.  Great volume level, quality sound, and fun design.  The charge holds for a good period of time and has floating capability, great for camping at the lake.

reviews.text: The speaker has great sound and the kids love the light show! Very loud and good bass.

reviews.text: Other than the weight, i have nothing negative to say about this speaker. It connects to our devices without issues and sounds great.

reviews.text: Great speaker.  You definitely get your money's worth with the quality speaker.  Also does really good in the pool.

reviews.title: Amazing sound for such a small speaker
reviews.text: I was amazed to hear the loud and clear sound that this small speaker had to offer. Making my room shake while keeping a clear sound. Most definitely recommend .

reviews.title: Altec rock box xl
reviews.text: I absolutely love altec. I’ve purchased various sizes in their smaller speakers but this large one has by far been my favorite. I took it river rafting and it performed to its expectations. I would definitely recommend  it.

reviews.title: Excellent!!!
reviews.text: I love loud music and i was skeptical but i must say its worth it. Had everyone at the cookout asking where I got it from because they want one. Winner!!!

reviews.title: If you want loud, this is loud!
reviews.text: This speaker is mega loud when connected to my phone via Bluetooth. In connecting it wired to my projector though it is really quiet. I believe this is an output issue for my projector, and for that reason I give it 5 stars!
reviews.author: BassBrigade

reviews.title: Altec boom box
reviews.text: For the money this is well worth it! Was this or the jbl version.   This was $450 less and times are tough ... went with this model . I own two other models by altec and always been pleased with them.
reviews.author: Michaelk

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: Lasted half a year with little use always charged it but now it wouldn’t turn on and charge indicator is not lighting up when charging.
reviews.author: Jmeza

reviews.title: Strong, durable, worth the price.
reviews.text: Excellent portable speaker. Decent sound quality. Rugged build. Has good battery life. Bass is devent but only really comes out at higher volume. Overal goid sound quality though. Pleased with this product.
reviews.author: PCDeviant

reviews.title: Great for the 1st year / poor customer service
reviews.text: Buyer Beware!!  A Christmas present for my daughter.  It worked great for the 1st year, then it suddenly stopped charging/no power.  I contacted customer service for Alltec Lansing and they did nothing for me and offered me nothing.   For $200, I would have hoped this slightly used speaker would have lasted longer then 1 year!!  Free Tip...spend the extra money and get a JBL, Sony etc.
reviews.author: EricO

reviews.title: Great Sound
reviews.text: Was pleasantly surprised with sound.  Good bass, really long battery life.  Liked it so much I bought another one.  Blue tooth range limited to around 30 feet.

reviews.title: Altech Lansing - RockBox XL
reviews.text: Excellent product.  Only issue I saw was that the volume is pretty low then it goes to loud.  There isn't much mid volume control.  Other than that, it's been an excellent product.

reviews.title: Cheap quality
reviews.text: Made a horrible rattling noise when the speaker was at high volume.

reviews.title: Awesome!!
reviews.text: I'm so happy with this speaker that I'm considering buying a second one to link up. The bass output is so much better than I expected. If it charged using USB, I would consider it perfect.

reviews.text: I really love it, it earit very well and good quality for the speaker size

reviews.text:
I bought 2 of these speakers and it’s hard to sync both to play in tandem. When I finally get them to play together one will drop out and I had to start all over. It notes that you can sync up to 10 devices.
Sound quality is good.

reviews.title: Groovy
reviews.text: Amazing sound quality and durability. Very well made. The light show is also a nice built in feature
reviews.author: Joey

reviews.title: Not good for bass
reviews.text:
This speaker is NOT for you if you’re looking for good bass. The sound is great, very powerful tweeters but the bass is not noticeable at all even with the volume up half way or even 3/4 of the way up. 

For anyone that listens to heavy bass, the metal mesh on the back side of the speaker is actually in the way of the woofer. When you turn the volume all the way up, the shooter will touch/rattle the mesh causing an ANNOYING rattling sound
reviews.author: Irving03

reviews.text: Very nice Bluetooth speaker. Nice sound, good quality.Highly recommend A+

reviews.text: I enjoy this bluetooth speaker. Have very good bass and the volume is good also. A pretty good balance of sound for a reasonable price.

reviews.title: Not the most durable

reviews.title: Great speaker, poor bluetooth range.
reviews.text: Use it for U12 Soccer practice and warmups.  Works very well.  Only thing keeping it from getting 5 stars is the bluetooth range is not great.  Can only be 15 feet away before it cuts out.

reviews.text: Soundwise it just doesn't cut it for me.. our use is mainly on the beach and the volume is not as high or clear. We end it up buying a Ion sports Bluetooth speaker. With many features and great sound it even brought a microphone etc. For a lesser price.

reviews.title: Life of the pool party

reviews.text:
This is sure to be the talk of the party.
Has several different settings to choose from
reviews.author: Buckle

reviews.title: Altec Lansing RockBox XL Review
reviews.text: I once own a similar Altec Lansing inMotion Boombox.  This once is even better!  The older model required D batteries.  But it had an iPod dock (long before Bluetooth was popular).  This one absolutely does the job.  The sound is incredible.  I can only dream of a model that works with Apple AirPlay.  Maybe one day...  But for now, this is a great purchase.
reviews.author: mreid1988

reviews.title: Must have speaker of the summer!
reviews.text: So far only been a month but I LOVE this thing! I had a smaller Altec speaker for a decade and let me tell ya, Altec knows how to make indestructible outdoor speakers! It truly can float in water and you can even answer or decline calls from it hands-free! Love the USB charging port. I am a big fan of LED party lights so that is a huge perk. I have been on the market for a new, bigger, summer speaker for floating the river, working in the garage, or BBQ in the backyard, but did not want to pay an arm and a leg. $150 is a steal for the size of this thing. It really has great bass and the 360 sound is great. I love the handle for portability. So far, I tested out the battery playing at a medium volume with the lights on and it lasted 14 hours! I might even get a second one to pair it.
reviews.author: ChangaWanga

reviews.title: Large
reviews.text: Very large! Sounds great but did not wnt something that looks like an 80’s boom box
reviews.author: Totahiti

reviews.title: Large Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text: It’s very loud and great quality. But I got it on sale for 100$. Not sure I would have bought it for full price.

reviews.text: Product is excellent. Shipping in it's box only was poor decision. Gift was for son who saw the unwrapped original box when it arrived. Ruined Christmas surprise.

reviews.text: Bought as a Christmas gift, everyone was impressed by the great sound.

reviews.title: Boom box for boomers.
reviews.text: I love the fact I can charge it and take it outside and not have to worry about plugging it in or getting it wet. It  has Bluetooth too which just makes it so convenient. The sound is very good also. It’s not Bose for $500, it’s a very good sound system that’s portable and convenient for $99.00.
reviews.author: Martymick

reviews.title: Rock Box XL
reviews.text: The speaker is a good size for parties and outdoor gatherings. The audio quality is good and clear, sounds great.  I do wish the base was better on this and i was very suprised it wasn't better because of its size. Overall I'd give this speaker a 7.5 out of 10. The lighting effects are a nice touch if its your thing. Im glad i got on sale for $99 and not $200+
reviews.author: Samuel

reviews.title: Loud speaker

reviews.text: Sound is awesome. Bass hits. Grwat product especially for $100 BF Sale!

reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: Bigger than I thought it was going to be. Awesome sound and it floats.
reviews.author: Karenj24

reviews.title: Not enough bass for it's size!
reviews.text: I got this for $99 and still returned it. It is big and heavy, which I thought was going to be wonderful for the bass.. but nope.. It barely has bass with no extra bass feature.. I tried apps to increase the bass but no luck. It does, however have nice clean highs. But, for the size and weight, its not worth it. I had already purchased an Anker Soundcore Select Pro from Walmart for $50 regular $100 and the bass on that kicks this XL's butt !! The soundcore has rich deep bass which this is sorely lacking!
reviews.author: Sean

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Great sound. Use for audio to watch movies. Battery last a long time
reviews.author: Waterous

reviews.title: Buy this
reviews.text: This thing is great! Great sound, Bluetooth connects easily, and the lights are cool
reviews.author: Lt56

reviews.title: It WAS good
reviews.text: For the first week and a half this speaker was great. Good sound, loud enough for what I needed and the lights were awesome, then the Bluetooth connection started cutting out ever 2 minutes and pausing my music. I can’t tell if it’s something I did or just the speaker malfunctioning.
reviews.author: ItWASgood

reviews.title: Great sound definitely not water Proof
reviews.text: The sound is arguably 5 stars and the battery is better than most.  Pairing is a great option too.  The product boasts that it can float in water, like in a pool.  However, with it covered under a canopy it was left out in a mild rain storm for two hours where a mist must have apparently got on the speaker.  Unnoticeable until it started to completely rust.  It still sounds great but not looks like something from the dump.  Not only is it not water proof but it's not even water resistant in mild conditions.  I expected much more quality.
reviews.author: Provsteamroller

reviews.title: Did not last lonf
reviews.text: Stop working after a couple days of use. Would not charge.
reviews.author: AceSr

reviews.title: Good Christmas gifts

reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.text: I was just planning on purchasing one of these speakers to gift to someone but ended up keeping it. I love it!!
reviews.author: Aymmay

reviews.title: Party time with this speaker!
reviews.text: Love everything about this speaker. The sound is great. The volume capacity is really loud. The battery lasts a very long time. The light flashing with the music is so cool. Appreciate the fact it is water resistant, so if splashes of water hit it I am not concerned.
reviews.author: Greg

reviews.title: Blasting Boombox Beats
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband a he loves it. Its loud and it thumps!! Rocking the work day, inside and always the center of attention with the party lights and gathering all those in range of its sound, close to its post where the BBQ pit master is occupied serving up his highly demanded slow cooked chicken and tri tip, hot and right off the grill!!
reviews.author: TamaraGrubbs

reviews.title: Great Sound and Lights
reviews.text:
I love this thing. The only issues I have are;
1. The speakers are only on  one side, so the sound is only emitted in one direction unlike my UE BOOM 2 speakers.
2. Like the speakers, the lights are only visible from the front (handle and base). There are no LEDs on the base in the rear.
If not for these two issues, I'd give it 5 stars.
